name: Gensokyo Odyssey
short_description: Gensokyo Odyssey! A Touhou satirical visual novel where you find yourself lost in Gensokyo with only your schoolbag and an air hockey puck.
detailed_description:
After a normal commute goes horribly wrong, you wake up in a strange land with your only weapon being an air hockey paddle.

In this adventure inspired by the Touhou Project, battle through Gensokyo with bullet hell battles reimagined as chaotic air hockey duels, use your non-existent charm and wit to talk your way out of (and into) trouble, and join Reimu and Marisa on a quest to save the world! …probably.

Features

  • Talk to a wide array of characters!

Meet faces both familiar and NEW! (New unless you saw the fanart for this game! Uh oh!) Get dragged into ridiculous situations and schemes, and watch everything go to hell!

  • Air hockey-based fighting?! HUH?!!!! How does that work? Guess I'll have to find out!

Go head-to-head with opponents in an extremely unique combat system; scoring pucks, completing minigames and dodging attacks alike!

  • Live-action elements

Watch Kronington do stupid stuff on film that's it

  • Huge original soundtrack

If you keep on dying, at least you can listen to the cool jazzy 64-track OST by Kronington while you do! Featuring both original compositions and full reimaginings of Touhou classics, you can enjoy hours of funk and bebop solos cheering you on as you graze danmaku!

  • Le funny shenanigans

A lighthearted (not really), absurd journey filled with funny jokes (not really), and an unreasonable amount of references than necessary (really).

  • Multiple endings

Your choices shape how the story unfolds. How badly can you mess this up? Find out in...

Gensokyo Odyssey!

English*, Russian, Italian
*languages with full audio support
